title: efossus gladiatus
intro: Efossus gladiatus, also known as the sword fern, is a type of plant belonging to the family Dryopteridaceae. The medicinal properties of Efossus gladiatus include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Efossus gladiatus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
